Off Calendar Nov-02-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FORUM NON-CONVENIENS

Appearances via Zoom: Karen Prodromo of Fox Rothschild LLP (415.364.5540) for defendant and moving party; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Lyft Inc.'s unopposed "motion to dismiss for forum non-conveniens" is granted. Order signed. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/RBU)

Appearances via Zoom: Karen Prodromo of Fox Rothschild LLP (415.364.5540) for defendant and moving party; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Lyft Inc.'s unopposed motion for sanctions is granted. Order signed. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/RBU)
